battle_pass.title: Battle Pass
battle_pass.modal_intro: Fight battles, level up and earn unique rewards
battle_pass.progress: {current} of {needed, plural, one {{needed} game} other {{needed} games}} to level {next}

settings.show_stats_profile: Show stats next to avatar in profile
settings.show_stats_posts: Show stats next to avatar in posts
settings.notify_draw_proposed_label: Opponent proposed a draw on Arena
settings.notify_draw_cancelled_label: Opponent cancelled a draw on Arena
settings.notify_battle_declined_label: Opponent declined a battle on Arena
settings.notify_item_granted_label: Someone granted me a card or a card back
settings.notify_custom_card_back_requested_label: Someone requested a custom card back

surrender.title: Surrender
surrender.confirm_text: The opponent will win and the battle will end. This action cannot be undone
surrender.error: Failed to surrender. Please try again

decline_battle.title: Decline battle
decline_battle.confirm_text: You can decline the battle on your first move. The topic will be deleted, and the other player will be notified
decline_battle.error: Failed to decline the battle. Please try again

propose_draw.title: Draw
propose_draw.confirm_text: The opponent will receive a draw proposal notification, and the turn timer will pause. This action can be cancelled before the other player responds
propose_draw.waiting_subtitle: Waiting for the opponent's response. Turn timer paused
propose_draw.error: Failed to propose a draw. Please try again
propose_draw.cancel_error: Failed to cancel the proposal. Please try again

respond_draw.title: Draw
respond_draw.pending_subtitle: {name} proposes a draw. Turn timer paused
respond_draw.error: Failed to send response. Please try again

notifications.battle_joined_text: An opponent was found for your battle
notifications.draw_proposed_text: {proposer} proposes a draw in your Arena battle
notifications.draw_cancelled_text: {canceller} cancelled the draw in your Arena battle
notifications.battle_declined_text: {decliner} declined the battle with you on Arena

select_deck_modal.title: Choose your deck
select_deck_modal.text: Choose the deck for this battle. You won't be able to change it afterward
select_deck_modal.text_random_cards: Your opponent enabled the random cards modifier — you won't be able to choose a deck

challenge_modal.title: Start a battle
challenge_modal.no_deck: You need to build a deck of 20 cards first.
challenge_modal.opponent_hint: Optional. You can create an open battle and wait for an opponent inside the topic
challenge_modal.error_generic: Failed to send the challenge. Please try again

join_modal.title: Battle challenge
join_modal.error_generic: Failed to join the battle. Please try again

battle_start.first_turn_subtitle: The card deck is only visible during your turn

battle_open.title: {name} is looking for an opponent
battle_open.cancel_confirm_text: The battle will be deleted — no one will be able to join it, even with the link
battle_open.cancel_error: Failed to cancel the battle. Please try again

battle_turn.heading: Turn {turn} result
battle_turn.mana_deadlock_subtitle: {name} has no mana left for a turn

effect_result.mana_steal: Stole {value, plural, one {{value} mana} other {{value} mana}}
effect_result.elemental_tide: Elemental advantage doubled for {value, plural, one {{value} turn} other {{value} turns}}

battle_draw.title: Draw
battle_draw.subtitle: Players agreed not to continue the battle

battle_expired.title: {name} wins
battle_expired.subtitle: {name} didn't play a turn in 24 hours

stats_overview.title: Arena statistics
stats_overview.error: Failed to load statistics. Please try again

override.title: Player parameters
override.help: Overrides settings for this player. Leave empty to use the default values
override.error: Failed to save. Please try again

deck.title: My decks
deck.subtitle: Choose 20 cards. You can add only the strongest cards, but then you'll run out of mana fast in battle
deck.error: Failed to save the deck. Please try again
deck.no_slots: This player doesn't have any decks yet
deck.delete_confirm: Delete the deck "{name}"? You won't be able to get it back
deck.discard_confirm: You have unsaved changes. Switch and discard them?

sections.elemental_subtitle: Creatures from different universes. Each element is weaker or stronger than another. {link}
sections.bonus_subtitle: Various effects. The choice depends on your playstyle — go aggressive or play defensively

profile.battle_lock: This deck is currently in a battle — editing is unavailable

card_backs.title: Card backs
card_backs.subtitle: Stand out with a unique card design
card_backs.requires_wins: Requires {n, plural, one {{n} win} other {{n} wins}}
card_backs.error: Failed to select the card back. Please try again

custom.label: Custom
custom.already_pending: You've already sent a request — please wait for a response
custom.textarea_placeholder: Describe the card back in detail. Remember it shouldn't cover the card's colors
custom.success: Request sent! Your idea is under review — please wait for a response
custom.error: Failed to send the request. Please try again

cards.empty: No cards yet. Create the first one!
cards.confirm_delete: Delete card «{name}»? This action cannot be undone
cards.error_delete: Failed to delete the card. Please try again
cards.error_order: Failed to change the order. Please try again

grant.title: Grant card "{card}"
grant.already_granted: This player already has this card
grant.error: Failed to grant the card. Please try again
grant.revoke_error: Failed to revoke the card. Please try again

battles.already_deleted: The battle has already been deleted
battles.already_inactive: The battle is no longer active. Refresh the list
battles.confirm_delete: Delete battle #{id}? This action cannot be undone
battles.error_delete: Failed to delete the battle. Please try again
battles.cannot_delete_active: Cannot delete an active battle. Close it first
battles.error_load: Failed to load battles. Please try again

card_backs.title: Card backs
card_backs.help: Upload images and set how many wins are needed to unlock them. Recommended size — 640x360
card_backs.upload_error: Failed to upload the image. Please try again
card_backs.empty: No card backs yet. Add the first one!
card_backs.error_add: Failed to add the card back. Please try again

card_backs.confirm_delete: Delete card back «{name}»? This action cannot be undone
card_backs.error_delete: Failed to delete the card back. Please try again

grant.title: Grant card back "{card}"
grant.already_granted: This player already has this card back

requests.confirm_delete: Delete this request? This action cannot be undone
requests.error_delete: Failed to delete the request. Please try again
requests.error_load: Failed to load requests. Please try again

battle_pass.title: Battle Pass
battle_pass.help: Players earn levels for games played — wins, losses and draws alike. The level track shows up on the Arena profile tab and in the tag-page modal
battle_pass.games_per_level_help: How many games it takes to reach the next level
battle_pass.background_help: Set a neutral background to decorate the Battle Pass. Recommended size — 1600x400
battle_pass.background_upload_error: Failed to upload the background. Please try again
battle_pass.levels_help: Progression stops at the last level in the list. Every player starts at level one, so rewards make sense from level two up. They are granted automatically
battle_pass.empty: No levels yet — add the first one. Remember to run a recalculation on the Battles tab to update earned levels

settings.error: Failed to save the settings. Please try again
settings.battle_tag_help: Battles will be created in a topic with this tag
settings.how_to_play_help: Shown below the Challenge button on the Arena tag page. You can create a rules page using Friends of Flarum Pages. Don't add a link to hide the button
settings.buttons_help: Overrides the buttons on the Arena tag page
settings.custom_card_back_help: Players will be able to request a custom design and describe their idea in a text field. Requests will be listed here.
settings.style_title: Element and bonus colors and icons
settings.style_help: Overrides the color and FontAwesome icon for the selected element or bonus

card_edit.error_save: Failed to save. Please try again
card_edit.inactive_help: Inactive cards are unavailable when building decks
card_edit.status_public_help: Available to every player when building a deck
card_edit.status_personal_help: Available only to players you've manually granted it to

recalculate.title: Recalculate statistics
recalculate.warning: Recalculate wins, losses, and draws for all players based on the information in the database
recalculate.in_progress_warning: Don't close the page while recalculating
recalculate.error: Failed to recalculate battles. Please try again

bonus_effect_descriptions.poison: Deals 1 HP per turn for {value, plural, one {{value} turn} other {{value} turns}}
bonus_effect_descriptions.weaken: Reduces attack by 1 for {value, plural, one {{value} turn} other {{value} turns}}. Takes effect starting next turn
bonus_effect_descriptions.reflect: Reflects up to {value} damage back to the opponent. Won't trigger if 0 damage was taken
bonus_effect_descriptions.mana_steal: Drains {value, plural, one {{value} mana} other {{value} mana}} from the opponent and gives it to you
bonus_effect_descriptions.debuff_remove: Removes negative effects, including ones applied this turn
bonus_effect_descriptions.overload: Deals up to {value} pure damage. Bypasses any defense
bonus_effect_descriptions.resonance: If the element matches the previous turn's card — grants +{value} to attack and defense
bonus_effect_descriptions.sacrifice: Reduces your elemental card's attack by {value} and restores up to {value} HP
bonus_effect_descriptions.swap_stats: Swaps your elemental card's attack and defense for this turn
bonus_effect_descriptions.copy: Plays the bonus your opponent played this turn
bonus_effect_descriptions.elemental_tide: Doubles the elemental bonus for 3 turns. Takes effect starting next turn
bonus_effect_descriptions.elemental_dominance: Guarantees the elemental bonus, even if your element is weaker
bonus_effect_descriptions.random_effect: Triggers a random bonus card effect from your deck
bonus_effect_descriptions.amplify: Doubles the strength of an active poison or weaken effect until it ends
bonus_effect_descriptions.preparation: Removes the mana cost of your next turn
bonus_effect_descriptions.involution: Reduces the opponent's elemental card's attack and defense by {value}

errors.not_participant: You are not a participant in this battle
errors.deck_incomplete_opponent: The opponent hasn't built their deck yet
errors.battle_already_active: You already have an active battle with this player
errors.battle_no_longer_open: This battle is no longer open to join
errors.deck_personal_cards_not_granted: These personal cards haven't been granted to you: {names}
errors.invalid_image_type: Only jpg, png, gif, webp images are allowed
errors.file_too_large: The file is too large — 5 MB max
errors.draw_disabled: Draws are disabled by forum settings
errors.draw_already_proposed: A draw has already been proposed, waiting for a response
errors.cant_respond_own_proposal: You can't respond to your own proposal
errors.cancel_not_own_proposal: You can only cancel your own proposal
errors.deck_composition: The deck must contain 10 elemental and 10 bonus cards. Currently: {elementalCount} elemental, {bonusCount} bonus
errors.deck_locked_active_battle: You can't change your deck during an active battle
errors.deck_select_locked: You can't change your deck: you've already played a card in this battle
errors.deck_slot_limit: You can create up to {max} decks
errors.deck_slot_in_use: This deck is currently in use in an active battle
errors.decline_not_first_move: You can only decline the battle on your first move
errors.cant_play_bonus_as_main: You can't play a bonus card as the main card
errors.card_not_in_deck: This card is not in your deck
errors.card_already_played: This card has already been played in this battle
errors.need_one_main_one_bonus: You must play one elemental and one bonus card per turn
errors.card_not_bonus: This card is not a bonus card
errors.bonus_card_not_in_deck: No such card in your deck
errors.bonus_card_already_played: This card has already been played in this battle
errors.custom_card_back_disabled: Custom card backs aren't available right now
errors.custom_card_back_already_pending: You've already sent a request — please wait for a response
errors.recalc_already_running: A recalculation is already in progress
